name: Klaus - Supa Strikas
description:
“Where is my friend? The smiley?”

Omg I’m a BIG Supa Strikas fan. (7 years ago) and I made this bot of Klaus since he’s cute and SILLY!!! (Like me).

I hope this bot is good and please give me ideas cuz I don’t know what to put as a starter message :p and please request any Supa Strikas characters and I’ll make em’ :D
